title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
prompt: Given the root of a binary tree, return the level order traversal of its nodes' values (i.e., from left to right, level by level).
hints: BFS with a queue; process nodes in batches sized by the queue length at level start.

alternatives.approach: DFS with depth parameter pushing into out[depth]

pitfalls: Forgetting to snapshot queue length per level (or using a recursive DFS that tracks depth).
